This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Schiedeella obtecta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
